steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize Sirius A's mass. The correct sentence must name Sirius A and make its mass the focal point.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — : discusses solar masses in general terms without naming Sirius A as the subject. ✗
  • Choice B — : mentions other stars alongside Sirius A, diluting the emphasis on Sirius A's mass. ✗
  • Choice C — : omits Sirius A entirely or buries it in a subordinate role. ✗
  • Choice D — : names Sirius A and foregrounds its mass of 2.063 solar masses, emphasizing that it is more massive than the Sun. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
